title: Craft a Crying Obsidian
description: Mod Makes you able to craft a Crying Obsidian with 3 steps
body:
**This Mod adds a recipe for the Crying Osidian with 3 steps see them below or in gallery (works on forge 1.16.5 , 1.17.1 , 1.18.2 and 1.19.2) 1.20.4 in future plans.**

# **Step 1**

Add in the middle of the crafting table obsidian block , and in all sides lapis lazuli , and in all corners cyan dye. like in the picture below.
 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Step 1   Add in the middle of the crafting table obsidian block , and in all sides lapis lazuli , and in all corners cyan dye. like in the picture below.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b80290a09101d8044ece89561b9cebbbf1e34961.png)

</details>

# **Step 2**

Smelt the lapised Obsidian. like in the picture below.
 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![ Smelt the lapised Obsidian. like in the picture below.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39cd090b13068ea621dfba117fa9c459dbd24445.png)

</details>

# **Step 3**

Add Redstone to the smelted lapised obsidian in the smithing table. like in the picture below


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![Add Redstone to the smelted lapised obsidian in the smithing table. like in the picture below](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0824a1df0202b606a6c55f541cecf361acf4dd9.png)

</details>
